name: Gingered Beet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil beets in a large, heavy saucepan until tender.
2. Remove cooked beets to a bowl of cold water. When cool enough to handle, slip off skins and discard them.
3. Slice or chop the beets.
4. In a small skillet over medium heat, cook ginger and sesame seeds in oil, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
5. Remove pan from heat and stir in miso and 1/4 cup beet cooking liquid.
6. Cool dressing mixture slightly before adding lemon juice.
7. Toss dressing with beets until well coated.
